tiles.title: Enrollment Status Distribution
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| summarize Count = count() by EnrollmentState
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: Profile Assignment Status
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| summarize Count = count() by DeploymentProfileAssignmentStatus
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: Devices by Group Tag
tiles.query:
AutopilotSummaryByGroupTag()
| project GroupTag = iff(isempty(GroupTag), '(No Tag)', GroupTag), TotalDevices, Enrolled, Pending, Failed, EnrollmentRate
| order by TotalDevices desc

tiles.title: Devices by Manufacturer
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| summarize Count = count() by Manufacturer
| order by Count desc
| take 10

tiles.title: Top 10 Models
tiles.query:
AutopilotByHardware()
| project Model, Manufacturer, DeviceCount, EnrollmentRate
| take 10

tiles.title: Never Contacted Devices
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| where isnull(LastContactedDateTime)
| project SerialNumber, Manufacturer, Model, GroupTag, EnrollmentState, DeploymentProfileAssignmentStatus
| take 100

tiles.title: Deployment Profiles
tiles.query:
AutopilotProfiles_Current
| project DisplayName, Description, DeviceNameTemplate, DeviceType, ProfileType, CreatedDateTime, LastModifiedDateTime
| order by DisplayName asc

tiles.title: Devices by Profile Assignment Status
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| where DeploymentProfileAssignmentStatus == 'assignedInSync'
| summarize DeviceCount = count() by DeploymentProfileAssignedDateTime = bin(DeploymentProfileAssignedDateTime, 1d)
| order by DeploymentProfileAssignedDateTime asc

tiles.title: Search Autopilot Devices
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| project SerialNumber, Manufacturer, Model, GroupTag, EnrollmentState, DeploymentProfileAssignmentStatus, UserPrincipalName, LastContactedDateTime, ManagedDeviceId
| order by SerialNumber asc
| take 500

tiles.title: Recent Successful Enrollments (Last 7 Days)
tiles.query:
AutopilotDevices_Current
| where EnrollmentState == 'enrolled'
| where LastContactedDateTime > ago(7d)
| project SerialNumber, Manufacturer, Model, GroupTag, UserPrincipalName, LastContactedDateTime
| order by LastContactedDateTime desc
| take 50
